text:
rafan       2007-07-31 02:29:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/nitrogen    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    sysutils/nitrogen/files patch-data-icon-theme-installer 
                            patch-src-NWindow.cc 
                            patch-src-Thumbview.cc 
  Log:
  Nitrogen is a background browser and setter for X windows. It is written
  in C++ using the gtkmm toolkit.
  
  WWW: http://l3ib.org/nitrogen
  
  PR:             ports/114282
  Submitted by:   Jonathan Liu <Net147 at hotmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
